title: Venue Directions
subtitle: Follow these landmarks from the main entrance to reach the session conducting hall.

destination.name: Session Conducting Hall
destination.description: Main hall for Beauty of Cloud 2.0 workshops and sessions.

map.buildingName: New Faculty Building (Management Faculty New Building)

steps.instruction: Begin your journey at the university's main entrance gates (marked as point 1). Once you enter through the gates, proceed straight ahead along the main entrance walkway.
Continue moving forward until you reach the circle where the prominent Sumangala Statue is located (marked as point 2). At this roundabout, take a left turn to follow the pathway.

As you walk down this path, you will pass the serene Budumedura (Buddhist shrine room, marked as point 3) situated on your right-hand side. Keep moving forward along the path keeping the shrine area to your right.

Shortly after the shrine, you will arrive at traffic junction(marked as point 4). At this junction, make a right turn onto the wide road, passing the Faculty of Management Studies & Commerce which is on your left.

Follow this road straight ahead past the Open Canteen area. You will find your final destination - the New Management Faculty Building(marked as point 5) - conveniently located right at the end of this path.
